parameters.query:
SELECT 'opportunities' AS module, COUNT(*) AS count, MAX(last_refreshed) AS last_updated FROM gda_opportunity_tracker
UNION ALL SELECT 'contacts', COUNT(*), MAX(updated_at) FROM gda_contacts
UNION ALL SELECT 'teaming_partners', COUNT(*), MAX(updated_at) FROM gda_teaming_partners
UNION ALL SELECT 'contract_vehicles', COUNT(*), MAX(updated_at) FROM gda_contract_vehicles
UNION ALL SELECT 'wargames', COUNT(*), MAX(updated_at) FROM gda_wargames
UNION ALL SELECT 'ndaa_intel', COUNT(*), MAX(ingested_at) FROM gda_ndaa_intel
UNION ALL SELECT 'dept_market', COUNT(*), MAX(last_updated) FROM gda_dept_market;

SELECT solicitation_number, opp_title, agency, dept, gda_score, gda_label, eis_fit_score, stage, estimated_value, response_deadline, source_url FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE gda_score >= 60 ORDER BY gda_score DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT company_name, uei, size_status, naics_codes, core_capabilities, relationship_strength, nda_status, notes FROM gda_teaming_partners ORDER BY CASE relationship_strength WHEN 'Strong' THEN 1 WHEN 'Active' THEN 2 WHEN 'Warm' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END LIMIT 10;
